on

Erstwhile Super Falcons forward, Desire Oparanozie, has offered his former teammates tips on how they can conquer Brazil, DAILY POST reports.

Randy Waldrum’s side will be up against Brazil in their opening fixture at the 2024 Olympic Games on Thursday (today).

Oparanozie posited that the Super Falcons need a strong mentality to overcome the South Americans.

“What helps win games is mentality, irrespective of preparation or the opponent or any other negative factor,” Oparanozie told Lagos Talks.

“If everyone of them can get into the party, get into every game with their A-game, concentrate and focus till the last whistle, I feel we can get something from it.”

The encounter is slated for the Matmut Atlantique Stadium, Bordeaux.

It will kick-off at 6pm Nigeria time.
